en: Oh sing to the LORD a new song; sing to the LORD, all the earth!
zh: 你們要向耶和華唱新歌， 全地都要向耶和華歌唱。

en: Sing to the LORD, bless his name; tell of his salvation from day to day.
zh: 要向耶和華歌唱，稱頌他的名， 天天傳揚他的救恩。

en: Declare his glory among the nations, his marvelous works among all the peoples!
zh: 要在列國中述說他的榮耀。 在萬民中述說他奇妙的作為。

en: For great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised; he is to be feared above all gods.
zh: 因為耶和華是偉大的，該受極大的讚美， 他當受敬畏，過於眾神之上。

en: For all the gods of the peoples are worthless idols, but the LORD made the heavens.
zh: 因為萬民的神都是虛空的偶像， 但耶和華創造了諸天。

en: Splendor and majesty are before him; strength and beauty are in his sanctuary.
zh: 尊榮和威嚴在他面前， 能力和華美在他聖所之中。

en: Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the peoples, ascribe to the LORD glory and strength!
zh: 列國的萬族啊！你們要歸給耶和華， 要把榮耀和能力歸給耶和華。

en: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due his name; bring an offering, and come into his courts!
zh: 要把耶和華的名當得的榮耀歸給他， 帶著禮物進入他的院子。

en: Worship the LORD in the splendor of holiness; tremble before him, all the earth!
zh: 要以聖潔的裝束敬拜耶和華 ， 全地都要在他面前戰慄。

en: Say among the nations, "The LORD reigns! Yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved; he will judge the peoples with equity."
zh: 你們要在萬國中宣告：“耶和華作王！” 世界就堅定，必不動搖； 他必按著公正審判萬民。

en: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; let the sea roar, and all that fills it;
zh: 願天歡喜，願地快樂； 願海和海中充滿的，都翻騰響鬧；

en: let the field exult, and everything in it! Then shall all the trees of the forest sing for joy
zh: 願田野和其中的一切都歡樂， 那時林中的一切樹木都必歡呼。

en: before the LORD, for he comes, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness, and the peoples in his faithfulness.
zh: 它們都要在耶和華面前歡呼，因為他來了； 他來要審判全地。 他要按著公義審判世界， 憑著他的信實審判萬民。
